title: Ontario OBCA compliance obligation pack
description: Draft operational schedules for core Ontario OBCA and Ontario Business Registry maintenance obligations.

rules.title: Annual meeting planning deadline
rules.summary: Track annual meeting planning against the fiscal year end.

checklist: Confirm annual meeting timing against fiscal year end.
Prepare notice, agenda, and shareholder package.

rules.caveat: Operational date only; articles, by-laws, waivers, and meeting history can affect the workflow.

rules.title: Initial return deadline
rules.summary: Track the initial Ontario Business Registry return from incorporation.

checklist: Verify corporation number, registered/head office, directors, officers, and company key custody.
Prepare the initial return filing packet.
File through the Ontario Business Registry or approved service path.
Capture confirmation number, receipt, and profile-report evidence.

rules.caveat: Confirm entity-specific Ontario Business Registry instructions and filing status.

rules.title: Annual return filing window
rules.summary: Track an annual return filing window from fiscal year end to an operational six-month due date.

checklist: Review Ontario Business Registry profile data.
Prepare the annual return filing packet.
File through the Ontario Business Registry or approved service path.
Archive confirmation, receipt, and profile-report evidence.

rules.caveat: Draft operational window; confirm current Ontario Business Registry annual-return instructions before filing.
